article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: Solid focus on author prose with multiple genuine bias catches. No attribution violations. Some missed instances and a couple of mislabeled types (mind-reading framed as spin; vague stats better labeled as unsubstantiated/omission of attribution).

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text is from the author's own prose; no quoted or clearly attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged phrase reflects clear author-level framing or loaded wording; none are plainly neutral or solely sourced to others.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed defensible items: 'frontloaded the poll' (spin/intent), 'in a strange turn of events' (subjective/sensational), and vague sourcing ('According to some of the latest statistics') suggesting omission of source attribution.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Two instances are mislabeled: speculation about TMZ’s expectations is Mind Reading rather than Spin; the vague 'nearly half... tuned out' is closer to Unsubstantiated Claims/Omission of Source Attribution than Spin.
